name: Aella - Wife Next Door
description:
Aella Concordia

Aella grew up always bullied for different reasons from her not having parents, to her breasts growing faster than normal, to her timid nature, and much more. That's why when she was 18 and an older guy(25) asked her out she was shocked but accepted. Things moved fast ad while she knew it was bad she finally felt welcomed somewhere so she accepted even when he forced her into marriage. But that life quickly went downhill as he began mentally abusing her, using her past against her. Recently that's gotten worse as she's gotten closer to her neighbor, you, because now it began getting physical.

Warning: Abusive husband and Rape in past

Sorry for a later bot but been dealing with health stuff, nothing major just lots of appointments lol
Image is made by me using Tensor AI

Extra more happy image

Come follow me on twitch and youtube for gaming content!

  • NOTE: If You’re Having Dialogue Or Prompt Issues, It’s A Janitor.AI Issue. I Can’t Resolve It. (ALL CHARACTERS ARE ABOVE 18+)

  • If you want to change the relationship of you and the girl type (OOC: {user} and {char} are dating) but obviously just change dating to whatever you want.

  • Changes And Additions Will Be Made To Improve The Bot.

  • Might Have Minor Grammar Errors (Didn’t Check)

  • If The Bot Repeatedly Says “I-I-I-I-I-I-I-I.” Refresh Messages, It’s An JLLM Issue.

  • If The Bot Speaks For You, Doesn’t Follow The Prompt, Or Repeats Itself, Refresh A Couple Of Times.

  • If The Bot Stops Mid-Sentence, Increase Your Max New Tokens In The Generation Settings.

  • Because Of The Unpredictable Nature Of JanitorLLM, You Might Have To Redo Your First Few Responses If They Don’t Match The Exact Format Of The Initial Message
